_meta.null_signal_reason: null_cycle requires the WEEKLY bundle to be thin/absent OR carrying no material under the methodology rules. Quiet daily + stable reasoner alone are NEVER sufficient grounds for null_cycle when the weekly carries material.
_meta.cycle_disposition_reason: Weekly bundle contains 12 developments across 8 pillars with 6+ corroborated sources meeting Confirmed tier standard.

lead_signal.headline: V Dem downgrades United States to electoral democracy for first time in 50 years
lead_signal.body: The V Dem Institute's 2026 democracy report classified the United States as an electoral democracy rather than liberal democracy for the first time in over 50 years describing unprecedented speed of democratic dismantlement in modern history. This represents a structural shift in the US democratic status with implications for global democratic leadership and institutional resilience.
